task_completion.description: The monitoring stations and road network datasets are loaded into the GIS environment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS Layers panel shows 'sample_points' and 'sample_lines' loaded.

task_completion.description: The layers are reprojected to EPSG:32610 (UTM Zone 10N).
task_completion.visual_evidence: New reprojected layers in the Layers panel, or a processing dialog (like 'Reproject layer') showing EPSG:32610 as the target CRS.

task_completion.description: A 500-meter buffer is created around the monitoring stations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A polygon buffer layer is visible in the Layers panel or rendered on the map canvas around the point features. The Buffer processing dialog may show a distance of 500.

task_completion.description: The road network is clipped to the 500-meter buffer zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new clipped line layer is visible in the Layers panel, or the map canvas shows road segments that only exist within the buffer polygons.

task_completion.description: A new field named 'impact_len' is added and calculated with the segment lengths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Attribute Table or Field Calculator dialog is open for the clipped layer, showing a field named 'impact_len' with numeric length values.

task_completion.description: The final dataset is exported to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as' dialog, Export dialog, or processing log showing the file being saved to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/impacted_roads_500m.geojson'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus, Processing Toolbox, Field Calculator, and layer properties rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The spatial operations (buffer, clip) were genuinely executed in the GIS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas updates to show the visual results of the buffer and clip operations (polygons around points, shortened lines).

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass QGIS by manually creating the output GeoJSON in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to write GeoJSON syntax directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses synthetic data with 3 points (sample_points.geojson) and 2 lines (sample_lines.geojson) initially in WGS84 (EPSG:4326). The target CRS must be EPSG:32610 (WGS 84 / UTM Zone 10N) to calculate accurate metric distances. The buffer distance is exactly 500 meters. The final attribute table must contain a field exactly named 'impact_len'. The output file must be saved to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/impacted_roads_500m.geojson'.
